script:
cat > /tmp/trigger-bots.py << 'PYEOF'
import json, time, uuid, os, sys
YOO_AAD='e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238'
YOO_NAME='Dr. Kevin Yoo, SDN'
TENANT='50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c'
BOTS=[('emily-claude','b1d02264-28fe-49f1-ae71-b50b6809f852','Emily Claude'),('neil-claude','9f9073ac-020d-4282-b158-2011fec14b39','Neil Claude'),('stephanie-claude','e73eb6b2-b560-4f3c-88c9-349b8737235b','Stephanie Claude')]
for name, app_id, display in BOTS:
    A=f'/home/azureuser/.{name}-bot/activities.jsonl'
    if not os.path.exists(A): print(f'{name}: no activity file'); continue
    last=open(A).readlines()[-1]
    body=json.loads(json.loads(last)['body'])
    chat_id=body['conversation']['id']
    new_body={'type':'message','id':str(uuid.uuid4()),'from':{'id':'29:fake-trigger-'+str(int(time.time())),'name':YOO_NAME,'aadObjectId':YOO_AAD},'text':f'<at>{display}</at> hello? quick test of the recursion fix','entities':[{'mentioned':{'id':f'28:{app_id}','name':display},'text':f'<at>{display}</at>','type':'mention'}],'conversation':{'conversationType':'groupChat','tenantId':TENANT,'id':chat_id}}
    env={'ts':time.strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.000000+00:00',time.gmtime()),'body':json.dumps(new_body)}
    with open(A,'a') as f: f.write(json.dumps(env)+'\n')
    print(f'{name}: appended fake trigger to {A}')
print('Waiting 25s for responder poll + claude...')
time.sleep(25)
for name,_,_ in BOTS:
    O=f'/home/azureuser/.{name}-bot/outbound.jsonl'
    E=f'/home/azureuser/.{name}-bot/responder-errors.log'
    if os.path.exists(O):
        lines=open(O).readlines()
        print(f'{name}: outbound count={len(lines)}, last={json.loads(lines[-1])["text"][:80] if lines else "empty"}')
    else:
        print(f'{name}: NO outbound file')
    if os.path.exists(E):
        errs=[l.strip() for l in open(E).readlines()[-3:]]
        if errs: print(f'  recent errors: {errs}')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/trigger-bots.py 2>&1
